name: Karen's Herb Oatmeal-Potato Bread
recipeIngredient: 4 tbsp Butter, at room temperature (or vegetable oil)
3/4 tsp Dried thyme, rosemary, oregano, or basil (or a combination)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except sunflower seeds in the bread machine in the order suggested by the manufacturer.
2. Program the machine for raisin bread.
3. When the beeper sounds, add the sunflower seeds to the mixture.
